title: medicago italica subsp. helix
intro: Medicago italica subsp. helix, also known as yellow bird's foot or Italian burr clover, is a sub-species of the annual legume plant Medicago italica. It is a type of medicinal plant that has been used for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is rich in isoflavones and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving bone density, and supporting digestive health. Medicago italica subsp. helix can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes and osteoporosis.
